title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 57.500 - Bondsmen liable, when
text:
57.500.  Bondsmen liable, when. — The City of St. Louis may sue for and recover any and all sums of money payable into the treasury thereof by the sheriff of the City of St. Louis, for the payment of which said sums, the said sheriff and the sureties on his official bond shall also be liable.
(RSMo 1939 § 15678) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14730
